[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 10100011 4
1 00000001 1
2 00100000 1
3 11101101 6
4 01110011 5
5 01110000 3
6 11110100 5
7 01100010 3

01 10 01110000 3 match 5
12 21 01100000 2
23 32 00100010 2
34 43 00000001 1 match 1
45 54 00000000 a
56 65 00100000 1 match 2
67 76 01100001 3
70 07 01110000 3 match 5

02 20 01100000 2
13 31 10100000 2
24 42 00000000 a
35 53 00100000 1 match 2
46 64 00000001 1 match 1
57 75 00100000 1 match 2
60 06 01100000 2
71 17 01110000 3 match 5

03 30 00100000 1 match 2
14 41 00000000 a
25 52 00100000 1 match 2
36 63 10100001 3
47 74 00000001 1 match 1
50 05 00100000 1 match 2
61 16 11100100 4
72 27 01100010 3 match 7

04 40 00000000 a
15 51 00100000 1 match 2
26 62 01100000 2
37 73 00100011 3
[completion]
